title: Follow request management — GET /api/v1/follow_requests, authorize, reject
description:
## What
Implement follow request management for locked accounts. GET /api/v1/follow_requests returns pending inbound follow requests as an array of Account objects. POST /api/v1/follow_requests/:id/authorize creates the followers row and sends an Accept activity to the requester. POST /api/v1/follow_requests/:id/reject sends a Reject activity and removes the request. Inbound Follow activities to locked accounts go into a pending follow_requests state instead of auto-accepting.

## Why
Locked accounts are a key privacy feature. Without follow request management, Ivory's follower request notification badge is stuck at a non-zero number with no way to clear it. Part of sub-epic 8-D.

## Agent team pattern
- Spawn a Research subagent to: curl mastodon.social /api/v1/follow_requests to document the exact Account array response shape; check mastodon.social source for the Accept and Reject activity JSON shapes (type, actor, object fields); document the Relationship object changes after authorize/reject (following=true after authorize).
- Spawn an Implementation subagent to: add follow_requests table migration (id snowflake, follower_remote_id, followee_local_id, ap_activity_id, created_at); modify inbox Follow handler: check followee is_locked flag; if locked, insert to follow_requests instead of follows; implement GET /api/v1/follow_requests handler: query follow_requests JOIN remote_accounts, serialize as Account array; implement authorize handler: INSERT INTO follows, DELETE FROM follow_requests, enqueue Accept activity to requester inbox; implement reject handler: enqueue Reject activity, DELETE FROM follow_requests.
- Spawn a Test subagent to: write integration tests with in-memory SQLite; create locked local persona; dispatch inbound Follow from remote actor; assert follow_requests row created, follows row NOT created; call authorize; assert follows row created, follow_requests row deleted, Accept activity enqueued; call reject on separate request; assert Reject activity enqueued, row deleted; GET /api/v1/follow_requests returns correct Account shape.

## Test discipline
- Independent oracle: mastodon.social /api/v1/follow_requests live fixture for Account array shape; ActivityPub Accept/Reject spec shapes (not the serialization code under test); wiremock for asserting delivery to remote inbox.
- Test approach: integration test with in-memory SQLite; create locked account; send Follow activity; verify state transitions through each step; verify Accept/Reject JSON body shape matches mastodon.social fixtures using wiremock request capture.

## Defensive programming checklist
- Authorize endpoint: return 404 if follow_requests row does not exist (not panic)
- Reject endpoint: return 404 if follow_requests row does not exist
- Accept activity object field must be the original Follow AP activity ID (not the requester URI)
- Do not auto-accept follows to locked accounts — check is_locked before routing to follow_requests vs follows
- No .unwrap() in handler paths
- Deliver Accept/Reject asynchronously via delivery queue — do not block the HTTP response
